use_cases: Call-to-action buttons on landing pages requiring visual attention
Modern UI buttons with subtle ambient animation effects
Dark and light mode compatible button components
Accessible buttons with focus ring states for keyboard navigation
Premium-feeling interactive elements for conversion-focused interfaces
ai_summary: A shimmer button component featuring an animated linear gradient that sweeps across the button surface in a continuous 2-second loop. Supports both light and dark modes with appropriate color schemes, includes accessibility features like focus ring states for keyboard navigation, and uses Tailwind CSS for styling. The animation creates a premium, polished feel suitable for modern SaaS and e-commerce interfaces.
